attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROJECT_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.OBJECT_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) OBJECT_TYPE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ELEMENT_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ELEMENT_NUMBER, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) NAME, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.CREATION_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.CREATED_BY, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DESCRIPTION, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.STATUS_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) STATUS_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WF_STATUS_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WF_STATUS_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PM_SOURCE_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PM_SOURCE_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PM_SOURCE_REFERENCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PM_SOURCE_REFERENCE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.CLOSED_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.LOCATION_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.MANAGER_PERSON_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.CARRYING_OUT_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.TYPE_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TYPE_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PRIORITY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PRIORITY_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.INC_PROJ_PROGRESS_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) INC_PROJ_PROGRESS_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.REQUEST_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROGRAM_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE1, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE2 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE2, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE3 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE3, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE4 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE4, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE5 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE5, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE6 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE6, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE7 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE7, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE8 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE8, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE9 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)   ATTRIBUTE9, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE10 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)  ATTRIBUTE10,
TRANSLATE( STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE11 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ATTRIBUTE11,
TRANSLATE( STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE12 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ATTRIBUTE12, 
TRANSLATE( STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE13 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ATTRIBUTE13, 
TRANSLATE( STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE14 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ATTRIBUTE14, 
TRANSLATE( STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ATTRIBUTE15 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ATTRIBUTE15, 
TRANSLATE( STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.LINK_TASK_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) LINK_TASK_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.BASELINE_START_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.BASELINE_FINISH_DATE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROGRESS_OUTDATED_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PROGRESS_OUTDATED_FLAG, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WQ_ITEM_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WQ_ITEM_CODE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WQ_UOM_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WQ_UOM_CODE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WQ_ACTUAL_ENTRY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WQ_ACTUAL_ENTRY_CODE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.TASK_PROGRESS_ENTRY_PAGE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PARENT_STRUCTURE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.BASELINE_DURATION, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PHASE_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PHASE_CODE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PHASE_VERSION_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.TYPE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROGRESS_WEIGHT, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.BASE_PERCENT_COMP_DERIV_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) BASE_PERCENT_COMP_DERIV_CODE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.FUNCTION_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) FUNCTION_CODE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.ENABLE_WF_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ENABLE_WF_FLAG, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WF_ITEM_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WF_ITEM_TYPE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WF_PROCESS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WF_PROCESS, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.WF_START_LEAD_DAYS,
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.SOURCE_OBJECT_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_OBJECT_TYPE,
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.TASK_STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TASK_STATUS, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.TASK_APPROVER_ID, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TRAIL_FILE_NAME, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
 STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS,
(
select PROJ_ELEMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS
minus
select PROJ_ELEMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEMENTS)
